### Bug description

When parsing the following ``a.py``:

<!--
 If sharing the code is not an option, please state so,
 but providing only the stacktrace would still be helpful.
 -->

```python


import pytest
from pathlib import Path
from pylint.lint.utils import prepare_crash_report

class TestPrepareCrashReport:
    def test_prepare_crash_report(self, tmp_path):
        # Arrange
        ex = Exception("Test Exception")
        filepath = Path(__file__).resolve()
        crash_file_path = str(tmp_path / "crash_report_{}.md")

        # Act
        result = prepare_crash_report(ex, filepath, crash_file_path)

        # Assert
        assert isinstance(result, Path)
        assert result.exists()
        assert result.read_text().startswith("# Crash Report")

    def test_prepare_crash_report_file_not_found(self):
        # Arrange
        ex = Exception("Test Exception")
        filepath = Path("/non_existent_file")
        crash_file_path = "/tmp/crash_report_{}.md"

        # Act & Assert
        with pytest.raises(FileNotFoundError):
            prepare_crash_report(ex, filepath, crash_file_path)

    def test_prepare_crash_report_os_error(self):
        # Arrange
        ex = Exception("Test Exception")
        filepath = Path(__file__).resolve()
        crash_file_path = "/non_writable_dir/crash_report_{}.md"

        # Act & Assert
        with pytest.raises(OSError):
            prepare_crash_report(ex, filepath, crash_file_path)

    def test_prepare_crash_report_type_error(self):
        # Arrange
        ex = "Not an Exception"
        filepath = Path(__file__).resolve()
        crash_file_path = "/tmp/crash_report_{}.md"

        # Act & Assert
        with pytest.raises(TypeError):
            prepare_crash_report(ex, filepath, crash_file_path)
```
